NO APPEARANCE BY DEFAULTED DEFENDANT SYED ALINAEEM AKA SAM ALINAEEM DBA METHOD4 MOTOR SPORTS. DEFAULT OF DEFENDANTS HAS BEEN DULY ENTERED. AFTER EVIDENCE AND GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT RULES IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFAULTED DEFENDANTS AS FOLLOWS: DAMAGES: $155,400.00 PREJUDGMENT INTEREST $85,901.67 COSTS $930.00 JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2016 Continued To Jun-29-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing On Plaintiff Flagstar Bank, Fsbs Request For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up/Quieting Title Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Josehp LeVota, Esq., for and Plaintiff Flagstar Bank, FSB and with witness Mark Cook.
No appearance by defaulted BNC Mortgage, Inc.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant. The Court cancels the Deed of Trust recorded on Oct. 31, 2000, in the Official Records of the San Francisco County Recorder's Office as Document No. 2000-G857669-00 benefiting BNC Mortgage, Inc. and encumbering that certain real property commonly known as 1944 Clement St., San Francisco, CA 94121 such that it is null, void and of no legal force or effect. (see scanned doc. for details of judgment).

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing On Plaintiff Flagstar Bank, Fsbs Request For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-05-2016 Continued To May-10-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Continued To May-18-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
